text:
From: http://www.freebsd.org/platforms/amd64/motherboards.html
"If a particular motherboard is not listed here, chances are we do not know about it."

Here is a non-listed amd64 motherboard:
GIGABYTE GA-M61P-S3 AM2 NVIDIA GeForce 6100 ATX AMD Motherboard
